hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$(basename "$f")" in .env.example|.env.sample) exit 0;; .env|.env.*) echo "Blocked: $f may contain the bridge password (see CLAUDE.md > Security). Edit .env.example instead." >&2; exit 2;; esac; exit 0
f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.go) command -v gofmt >/dev/null 2>&1 && gofmt -w "$f";; esac; exit 0
